provenance.dataset: GNoME (Graph Networks for Materials Exploration), public release
provenance.citation: Merchant, Batzner, Schoenholz, Aykol, Cheon, Cubuk, 'Scaling deep learning for materials discovery', Nature 624, 80-85 (2023), DOI 10.1038/s41586-023-06735-9
provenance.note_expanded_set: This is the EXPANDED release (materials within ~1 meV/atom of the convex hull, the Aug-2024 expansion to >520k), not the original 381k from the 2023 Nature paper. Used as-is, uncurated.
provenance.sampling: uniform random, pandas .sample(n=500, random_state=42); NO filtering/cherry-picking

strict_floor.desc: drops literature hits whose only match is the weak element_set kind (conf 0.45)
